text: Moving from the quiet, practical emptiness of a hallway into this vibrant, thought-provoking exhibition space fills me with a sense of transition—from the utilitarian to the intellectual. Here, amidst the interplay of technology and humanity, I feel the excitement of curiosity being invited and challenged. The colorful displays and interactive screens inspire me to ponder the boundaries of innovation, and I feel a gentle awe at how spaces can shape not just movement, but also thought.
